feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: I made some toast and poured myself some orange juice then I went out of the kit…
entry.content: I made some toast and poured myself some orange juice then I went out of the kitchen and got sat down and started watching a youtube video but I left my orange juice on the counter and now I have to go back in the kitchen to get my orange juice and I am not happy about this, anyway thanks for reading my blog u gay cunt

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Imagine walking down the street and seeing the number of movies each person has …
entry.content: Imagine walking down the street and seeing the number of movies each person has watched floating above their head.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: System Shock
entry.content: Just finished system shock for the first time. Ace game, I highly recommend it. I didn't think much of it at first, but then got really hooked on it at research level. I think I'm going to replay it on the higher difficulty settings.

entry.content: >be me, 6 y/o >introverted asf >always stay alone at school during recess >teachers and parents don't like that >they force me to make friends with classmates >don't wanna but have to >get mostly been hurt emotionally by other classmates for the next 4 years >get rejected, treated as "the dumb kid" etc >go back to being a loner >parents still force me to make friends >still don't wanna but try less this time >stay mostly with one friend i met in primary school >overall middle school is meh but c

entry.title: /int/ International: >everyone is going to abandon frontier models and agent harnesses so that they c…
entry.content: >everyone is going to abandon frontier models and agent harnesses so that they can save a few bucks on tokens Not sure what's with this Chinese propaganda. You don't see companies hosting on some chink cloud, or buying their employees Xiaomi phones. The West generally cares about reliability and SLAs and you don't get that with chinktech. The CCP has been running a surveillance state for decades now and despite having a camera on my every street corner, they never figured out LLMs, transformers,

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: How can this still happen in modern era?
entry.content: >Capital traveling at 14 knots in pitch black towards an island surrounded by rocks because he wanted to go fishing with his buddies How do they let such corrupt retarded people captain ships? I thought they learned their lesson after the Titanic 100 years ago. Also, who goes on cruises? What purpose do they serve other than providing the perfect environment for date rapists (the implications).

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Troubleshooting
entry.content: I've purchased a Honda CX500, and been working it for about a month ish now. Only problem was the throttle lagged, which I tried to fix by cleaning pilot valve. I also took the tank off because there was bad gas in it, but it ran fine otherwise before that. Cleaned that tank, new gas, fuel line, and carb clean with the float bowl off. (Prev owner JB welded it) Went to start it up, and would only go with choke fully in. After a bit of starter fluid, it would run consistently, but due as soon as t

entry.title: /g/ Technology: This is the best laptop I've ever had, holy shit. A true marvel of design, batte…
entry.content: This is the best laptop I've ever had, holy shit. A true marvel of design, battery life and screen. Plus macOS is a very capable unix for working on projects. Why is /g/ always wrong when it comes to tech?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: 1972 Pontiac Catalina refresh
entry.content: How far should I go with this? I want to do everything in my garage. No outsourcing, i had the wheels powder coated, but thats it thus far. I have new body mounts installed. New bushings on all the control arms, i have new brake lines to install, a new chassis harness. Im indecisive how much painting and stuff i should do. Or if i should just start reassembling and worry about doing a frame off restoration later. Go with the beater look for awhile. Its surprisingly well kept. The dry dust layers

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Y'know, I feel envious of people who can spend 3-5 hours playing video games in …

entry.title: /int/ International: The absolute BULLSHIT with aliens is that their anatomy matches humans in every …
entry.content: The absolute BULLSHIT with aliens is that their anatomy matches humans in every single "leak". So what? Is it just coincidence they have 4 limbs, 2 eyes and mouth all located the in the same place as humans. Wouldn't they have a completely different evolutionary timeline? They'd look nothing like us whatsoever if they evolved from a completely different spectrum of fauna. This implies either our structure is the optimal build for an advanced species or evolution works the exact same on every gol

I think few people are

entry.title: /int/ International: Niger became in the first country that banned Incelism
entry.content: Incelbros… >In 2025-2026, Niger's military government (through the Charter of Refoundation and the new Penal Code) included ASEXUALITY in a broad law against “LGBTQIA+ practices” and “acts against nature.” Specifically, Article 390 punishes the participation in or attempt of “indecent acts, acts against nature, or any Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender, Queer, Intersex, ASEXUAL (LGBTQIA+) practices” with imprisonment of 5 to 10 years and very high fines (up to the equivalent of approximately US

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Is B a good score by Christgau? The review seemed more harsh than the score
entry.content: >The Fragile [Nothing, 1999] >After six fucking years, genius-by-acclamation Trent Reznor delivers double-hoohah, every second remixed till it glistens like broken glass on a prison wall. Is the way he takes his petty pain out on the world a little, er, immature for a guy who's pushing 35? Never mind, I'm told--just immerse in the music. So I do. "Dream job: emperor," it says. "More fun than death by injection." B

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: My Catholic cope
entry.content: Yes, it is a sin to have any sexual thoughts or feelings on purpose about anyone or anything, except your spouse. People who are not married cannot purposely have any sexual thoughts or feelings at all about anyone or anything for their entire lives. As Jesus said, "If you look at a woman with lust, you have committed adultery in your heart." That is what Jesus said, and that is what the Catholic Church teaches. You must go your entire life without ever willfully having any sexual thoughts or fe

entry.title: /g/ Technology: seriously why do all AI slop graphics look like "that"

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Is there an honest reason /v/ hates competitive games so much? I get why certain…
entry.content: Is there an honest reason /v/ hates competitive games so much? I get why certain games are shit, but 1v1 skill based games like street fighter or age of empires 2, that reward you purely for how good you are at the game; your sheer practice, tactics, and willpower and have plenty of online opponents to fight of varying skill levels... how is this any different from a singleplayer game?? Why does v seethe so much at the idea??

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I truly hate that movies have come to this point. It's just all so...samey. Wher…
entry.content: I truly hate that movies have come to this point. It's just all so...samey. Where's the Technicolor? Where's the bombastic expressive freedom? It's all just bland and paint-by-numbers. We honestly need a budget cap like baseball has salary caps, limitations are the mother of creativity and just throwing money at every problem clearly hasn't worked

entry.content: >half the game so far spent saving, helping or working with niggers or native americans >not a single dark skinned NPC that's your enemy or evil at any point 20 hours in >all towns are extremely diverse in 1880s America >everywhere I go, there are women shouting they deserve voting rights >camp is full of girlboss characters who don't need no man The game's pretty good and the graphics and sound design are fucking amazing, but I had no idea how woke it'd be. I can only imagine what to expect wit

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Sonic Riders was considered "another bad Sonic game" >It was the only Sonic gam…
entry.content: >Sonic Riders was considered "another bad Sonic game" >It was the only Sonic game that gen that I geniunely enjoyed and still do >People finally began to understand how good it is and even has a competitive scene now Shame the idea is now dead thanks to Crossworlds but the resurgence of it has been cool, I think even the sequel is being seen more positively now.

entry.content: Will you at least give it a chance?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Why are "classic" survival horror games considered retro or outdated? I've been …
entry.content: Why are "classic" survival horror games considered retro or outdated? I've been playing them like pic related, flesh made fear, tormented souls, and currently RE: Code Veronica X, and I feel like they are not outdated. They feel more like video games than modern games. There are some things that are a chore, mostly too many loading screens, but other than that, they are fun.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Married vs Single
entry.content: Is it just from my experience or is it a common thing amongst these women? Whenever I've been brave enough to ask a woman who's married if she would be interested in doing anything sexual with another man, most likely she'll either: consider it or say yes but rarely say no. Then there's the single women who are more likely to decline immediately. Are married women more adventurous and open than single women? If so, what do you think the reason is?

entry.title: /b/ Random: Waifu thread Previous: I'm not pasting previous. Rules: >Claim your Waifu/Husban…
entry.content: Waifu thread Previous: I'm not pasting previous. Rules: >Claim your Waifu/Husbando >No Claiming Waifus/Husbandos that have already been claimed >No stealing (unless you roll trips) >Only one claim per person >Keep RP/ERP in private. >Discussion is welcomed >Insults must be original >No oversexualized content >If you're posting images you're not lurking >Stop reading these >3D is almost always trash >Joining means a reserved place in hell >Most importantly, have fun!

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Do you have CS degree?
entry.content: Anyone here who wasted their childhood or youth studying programming? There must be plenty of nerds on 4chan who used to grind Codeforces, Leetcode, Codewars, and similar garbage. How does it feel to realize you wasted your time for nothing? Nowadays, any random guy with a Claude Code AI agent can program without even knowing what variables and loops are. But the biggest losers are those who wasted their childhood and youth at universities studying Computer Science. You are obsolete now. Your in

entry.content: >"Kinship Skill" Edition /ACT/ is a weekly Caturday thread dedicated to cats and other felines. Calling all artists and writers: Feel free to post your art, stories, and WIPs! Whether it's just doodles, smut art, or full-blown anthro stories/greentexts, all are welcome to share and critique. Let the Caturday festivities begin!
